# Mister Ride Group

> Mister Ride Group is a Dubai-based mobility group operating across Dubai and the UAE. It provides chauffeur-driven limousine service, car rental with driver, Dubai tours and desert safaris, and managed car-fleet investment. The website is available in English, Russian, Arabic, Hindi and Urdu.

Contact: WhatsApp/phone +971 56 817 8590, email info@misterridegroup.com.

## Services
- [Limousine & chauffeur service](https://misterridegroup.com/limousine.html): Premium chauffeur-driven cars (Mercedes S-Class, Maybach, EQS, BMW 7, Cadillac Escalade, GMC Yukon and vans) for transfers, events and hourly hire in Dubai.
- [Car rental with driver (Carlift)](https://misterridegroup.com/carlift.html): Car with a professional driver by the hour, day or month across Dubai and the UAE.
- [Tours & desert safari](https://misterridegroup.com/tours.html): Dubai city tours and morning/evening desert safaris with hotel pickup.
- [Fleet investment](https://misterridegroup.com/investors.html): Managed car-fleet investment — fund premium vehicles that earn daily across ride and rental platforms and take a share of the income. No personal income or capital-gains tax in Dubai.
- [Ride CRM](https://misterridegroup.com/crm.html): The group's fleet-management software product.

## Popular services
- [Chauffeur service in Dubai](https://misterridegroup.com/chauffeur-service-dubai.html)
- [Airport transfer in Dubai](https://misterridegroup.com/airport-transfer-dubai.html): Private transfers with meet-and-greet at DXB and DWC, flight tracking, fixed pricing.
- [Car with driver in Dubai](https://misterridegroup.com/car-rental-with-driver-dubai.html)
- [Monthly car with driver](https://misterridegroup.com/monthly-car-with-driver-dubai.html)
- [Dubai city tour](https://misterridegroup.com/dubai-city-tour.html)
- [Desert safari in Dubai](https://misterridegroup.com/desert-safari-dubai.html)

## Guides (questions we answer)
- [How to get from Dubai Airport to the city](https://misterridegroup.com/guide-dubai-airport-to-city.html): DXB is about 24 km from the centre, a 15–20 minute drive in light traffic.
- [Dubai to Abu Dhabi: how to travel](https://misterridegroup.com/guide-dubai-to-abu-dhabi.html): About a 1 hour 20 minute drive via the E11.
- [Evening vs morning desert safari](https://misterridegroup.com/guide-evening-vs-morning-desert-safari.html)
- [Car with driver vs taxi in Dubai](https://misterridegroup.com/guide-car-with-driver-vs-taxi.html)
- [How much is a car with driver in Dubai?](https://misterridegroup.com/guide-car-with-driver-cost.html): Priced around the trip — car class, duration and distance.
- [How much is an airport transfer in Dubai?](https://misterridegroup.com/guide-airport-transfer-cost.html): Metro about 4–8.50 AED, taxi about 45 AED plus surcharge, private transfer is fixed-price.
- [Passive income in Dubai: 5 realistic ways](https://misterridegroup.com/guide-passive-income-dubai.html)
- [Investing in Dubai as a foreigner](https://misterridegroup.com/guide-invest-in-dubai-foreigners.html): No nationality restrictions, no residency requirement to buy property, no personal income or capital-gains tax.
- [Car fleet ROI in Dubai](https://misterridegroup.com/guide-fleet-investment-roi.html)
- [Fleet vs real estate](https://misterridegroup.com/fleet-vs-real-estate.html)

## Languages
Every page is available in English (default), Russian (.ru.html), Arabic (.ar.html), Hindi (.hi.html) and Urdu (.ur.html).
